title: × festulolium holmbergii
intro: × Festulolium holmbergii is a hybrid grass species, resulting from the cross between Festuca rubra and Lolium multiflorum, bred for its high yield and disease resistance. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of × Festulolium holmbergii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
